summary: Comprehensive testing of WBUK AI Whistleblower Triage Platform completed. All 8 requested features verified working: Session creation, Chat start API, AI chat responses, Multi-turn conversations, Admin login with JWT, Admin stats, Admin case list, and Password Gate frontend.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns 200 with healthy status
Root API endpoint returns version info
Session creation via /api/session/create works correctly
Session verification via /api/session/verify/{token} works
Invalid session returns 404
Chat start returns welcome message with WBUK branding
Chat message API returns AI response (GPT-5.2 via Emergent)
Multi-turn conversation maintains context (5+ messages)
Chat history retrieval works correctly
Admin login with JWT token works (andyd358@hotmail.com)
Admin login with invalid credentials returns 401
Admin /me endpoint returns current admin info
Admin stats endpoint returns dashboard statistics
Admin stats endpoint requires authentication
Admin cases list with pagination works
Admin cases filter by status works
Admin cases endpoint requires authentication
Evidence list for session returns correctly
Case submission after triage conversation works
Password Gate displays correctly with WBUK branding
Invalid password shows error message
Correct password (WBUK2026) grants access to platform
Landing page shows AI Triage Service with Start Confidential Chat button
Chat session creation navigates to /chat/{sessionToken}
Chat interface shows welcome message and AI responds conversationally
Admin login page has proper styling (red accent border)
Admin dashboard shows Total Cases, New Cases, In Progress, High Priority stats
Dashboard case table shows Reference, Sector, Type, Status, Priority columns
Status and Priority filter dropdowns work correctly
Logout returns to admin login page
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
AI integration (GPT-5.2 via Emergent) working correctly
Multi-AI provider support properly implemented in ai_provider.py
JWT authentication working for admin endpoints
Password gate properly protects site access
seed_data_creation: Two test cases exist in the system: WBUK-2026-4F84DFF0 (Healthcare - patient records) and WBUK-2026-36A2A534 (Government - procurement fraud)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 requested features verified working. Backend has 20 passing pytest tests. Frontend Password Gate, Chat flow, and Admin Dashboard all working correctly. AI responses working via Emergent/GPT-5.2. Two test cases exist in MongoDB for case management testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found requiring RCA
